name: Basic Arithmetic Computed Fields
summary: Simple math operations: addition, subtraction, multiplication, division using `format: computed`
whenToUse: Auto-calculating totals, differences, or products from user-entered numbers
Displaying computed results without manual entry (e.g., subtotal = price × quantity)
notes: Computed fields use `"type": "string", "format": "computed"` in the dataSchema
The `description` field IS the math expression — it references other fields via JSON pointer scopes
Computed fields are read-only in the UI — users cannot edit them
Result must be a finite number — NaN or Infinity shows an error
